sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83861" key="plhsifwte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλησῐ-φωτέω</orth>, <sense id="n83861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be waxing,</tr_> of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anub.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
